docket_entries.description: ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - DENIED. LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNING HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HOYER, KEN
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET-COVER SHEET RECEIVED FROM SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT FOR 11/14/2019 HEARING.

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR NOV-14-2019 IS DENIED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR KEN HOYER IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DOUG COOMER IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DID NOT SUPPORT HIS CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. MR. COOMER WANTED TO USE THIS MOTION TO DISPUTE THE JUDGMENT. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON WOULD NOT HONOR SUCH A REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOYER, KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOMER, DOUG $9,940.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOYER, KEN SERVED APR-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOMER, DOUG
ORDER AMENDED MAILING OF ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED JAN-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOMER, DOUG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KEN HOYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOUG COOMER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.
